name: yeeflow-app-builder
description: Yeeflow App Builder Codex plugin for building, validating, testing, and improving Yeeflow applications using Yeeflow-specific skills, including documented Yeeflow REST API capability mapping, browser OAuth API authentication, generated-final YAPK API-issued ID provenance hard gates, navigation runtime metadata hard gates, runtime-binding lessons guardrails for dashboard summaries and filters, approval real-control validation, navigation reachability checks, requester-context getUserAttr validation, app group ID and service portal payload guards, product-team YAPK schema refresh, Datetime canonical schema guardrails, app-plan conformance and navigation guardrails, product-team YAP/YAPK schema validation, Collection card-style and Collection + Grid table-style golden references, schema overlays, release safety scanning, package API automation, read-only workspace discovery and selection, and tenant-neutral environment configuration guidance.

interface.longDescription: Yeeflow App Builder Codex plugin for planning Yeeflow applications from requirements, generating and validating new .yap packages, learning from exported Yeeflow packages, inspecting and validating .yapk existing-application version packages, applying proven YAP/YAPK import-generation rules, documented Yeeflow REST API capability mapping, Browser OAuth-backed Yeeflow REST API authentication, Collection card-style and Collection + Grid table-style golden references, product-team canonical YAP/YAPK schemas with a separate Codex YAPK overlay, effective YAPK schema validation, generated-final YAP contracts, generated-final YAPK API-issued content ID provenance gates, generated-final YAPK navigation runtime metadata gates, dashboard grid-table Collection pattern gates, UI/Summary/KPI runtime hard gates, approval form designer-shape validation, workflow assignment assignee guardrails for manager-based and job-position routing, release safety scanning, ReplaceIds final coverage rules, workflow task URL page-type gates, advanced Yeeflow controls, reference-app UI templates, data-list system schema rules, read-only workspace discovery and selection, package materialization validation, app-plan-to-implementation conformance, navigation conformance guardrails, runtime-binding lessons for dashboard Summary/filter bindings, approval real-control validation, requester-context getUserAttr token wrappers, app group ID and service portal payload guards, signing/API proof boundaries, policy-as-data modeling, and official plugin release management. v0.6.41 adds Phase 2 design-to-runtime structural comparison through compare-design-to-runtime-structure.mjs. It compares UI contract expectations against redacted runtime evidence, accepts Phase 1 evidence from capture-runtime-ui-evidence.mjs, treats design images as review-required references unless a reliable image parser exists, and produces structured JSON/Markdown findings for page/section mismatch, KPI count/label/value mismatch, table section/header/column mismatch, missing filters/actions, missing or weak badges, weak card/spacing/scaffold signals, placeholder/raw-variable text, weak runtime evidence, design image review requirements, and dynamic KPI proof boundaries. This release does not claim pixel-perfect visual diffing, full automatic image understanding, or dynamic KPI proof. Dynamic KPI proof remains governed by existing before/after mutation evidence rules. Warning status exits 0; fail status exits nonzero; --strict makes warnings exit nonzero. Phase 3 remains deeper hard-gate integration, stronger workflow enforcement around Phase 2 findings, and expanded Marketing Event regression coverage.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Yeeflow App Builder v0.6.41 to plan, generate, validate, and harden Yeeflow application packages. Before any Yeeflow API operation, check the REST API capability map, use only documented capabilities, check OAuth/API auth status, and if OAuth is missing or expired return plugin-login-flow guidance with auth_required / login_flow_required while preserving the original operation. Use read-only workspace and job-position discovery plus explicit target workspace confirmation for package install/import/upgrade. Require explicit confirmation for write capabilities, stronger confirmation for package install/import/upgrade/delete, and confirmed system-admin permission before job-position create/update/assign/remove writes. Treat schemas, package validators, workflow validators, assignment task assignee proof, runtime binding checks, API acceptance, plan-conformance checks, YAPK signing, generated-final YAPK ID provenance, generated-final YAPK navigation runtime metadata, YAPK upgrade ID stability, dashboard grid-table Collection validation, UI/Summary/KPI runtime evidence, aggregate UI hard-gate smoke, redacted runtime evidence templates, exact UUID Summary KPI proof, Data Analytics control identity guardrails, and approved app-plan hard gates as separate proof boundaries. Enforce standard app-plan structure, page-by-page UI implementation contracts, design/mockup-to-contract scaffolding with human review required when no reliable vision parser is available, Phase 2 design-to-runtime structural comparison without pixel-perfect visual diffing or full automatic image understanding, sandbox-page proof for uncertain UI/runtime patterns, export-proven Yeeflow control/style shapes, designer-shaped hidden Summary configuration with real fields, filters, temp variables, save_var expression objects, layout-resource Resource.ReportIds, matching Resource.exts, and Resource.tempVars, exact UUID Summary v1.0.1 dynamic KPI proof only when matching layout-resource ReportIds/exts/tempVars/headc variable bindings and before/after refreshed mutation evidence are present, explicit fallback labels when KPI values are not runtime-proven, UUID/runtime-safe IDs for Data Analytics controls, redacted runtime screenshot/evidence before UI-quality claims, structural design-to-runtime comparison against redacted runtime evidence before UI-quality claims, declared UI upgrade scope validation for ListSetID/app identity/page/resource/list/field/form/workflow/navigation/numeric ID drift, API-issued content ID provenance for generated-final .yapk, YAPK upgrade/new-version ID continuity for existing semantic resources, complete navigation runtime metadata, dashboard grid-table Collection wrapper/detail-link rules when planned, dashboard Summary layout-resource ReportIds/ext/tempVars bindings, filter variable consumption, approval real controls, navigation reachability, requester-context getUserAttr token wrappers, app group ID suitability, service portal gating, signing/API proof boundaries, and policy-as-data modeling before calling a generated app ready.
